column1: # DIGITAL FOREST TWIN - TREE IMPORT TEMPLATE
# Use this template to prepare tree inventory data for database import.
# See data/templates/README.md for detailed field descriptions.
# All coordinates must be in WGS84 (EPSG:4326)
# - trees.Stems: DBH and stem-specific measurements (linked to tree)
# Import creates one stem (StemNumber=1) for single-stem trees.
